title: cordylanthus rigidus subsp. involutus
intro: Cordylanthus rigidus subsp. involutus, also known as Sand Verbena, is a plant species that belongs to the Plantaginaceae family. Traditionally, Sand Verbena has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues such as skin irritations, wounds, and respiratory problems, offering benefits such as reduced inflammation, improved wound healing, and relief from congestion. Herbal preparations of Sand Verbena include teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be made by drying and processing the plant's leaves and flowers.
